description_long: This is a classic baseball cap featuring a structured, rounded crown and a wide, flat brim. The crown is a deep maroon color, while the brim is a contrasting dark gray. The front of the cap displays a raised, embroidered 'C' logo in matching maroon, blending subtly with the crown. The back of the cap has an open section, likely for an adjustable strap, which is typical for this style. The fabric appears to be a soft, slightly textured material, possibly cotton or a cotton blend, with a matte finish. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A maroon baseball cap with a dark gray flat brim and a subtle embroidered 'C' logo on the front. The cap has a soft, textured fabric and an open adjustable back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon crown and the dark gray brim extending forward, with the cap's open back partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the embroidered 'C' logo on the maroon crown and the full width of the dark gray brim.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth curve of the crown and the flat, wide brim, with the open back just out of sight.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open back section, likely for an adjustable strap, and the rounded maroon crown.
